questions.q: On April 14, 2026, NFL reporter Dianna Russini resigned from The Athletic following the publication of photos showing her with which NFL head coach?
Which golfer issued an apology on April 14, 2026, after receiving a code-of-conduct warning for breaking his driver during the final round of the Masters?
Former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months of probation in April 2026 following a confrontation related to what?
options: A dispute with the university president
An affair with a former staff member
questions.correctText: An affair with a former staff member

questions.q: Which 40-year-old goaltender, holding the record for the most wins by a US-born goalie in NHL history, announced his retirement following his final game in April 2026?
On April 14, 2026, a new trial resumed in Argentina against seven health care professionals accused of negligence in the death of which soccer legend?
